name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement, new tone, new provider, or new feature
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## Problem / motivation

<!-- What are you trying to do that you can't do today?
     e.g. "I want to rewrite emails directly in Gmail without opening a separate tab" -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How would it work? What's the user experience?
     e.g. "Browser extension with a floating 'Humanize' button in any <textarea>" -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else could solve this? Why is your approach better? -->

## Are you willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes — I'd like to submit a PR
- [ ] No — I'm requesting it for someone else to pick up
- [ ] Maybe — I'd need guidance

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, links to similar tools, relevant API docs, etc. -->
